message:
Delete dead js/inlined.mjs template

This was a build-time template from an earlier inlining design where
js/build_inlined.mjs would substitute __WASM_BASE64__ at build time. The
current build_inlined.mjs writes dist/inlined.mjs from scratch (reading
js/cpp_loader.mjs + js/cpp_wasi_runtime.mjs and concatenating the wasm
bytes), so the template was no longer participating in any build path
and nothing imported it.

Verified clean:
- No other file imports js/inlined.mjs
- js/build_inlined.mjs writes dist/inlined.mjs without ever reading it
- js/index.mjs and tests/benches all reference dist/inlined.mjs
- 154 tests still pass
